name: PCCOOLER CPS KN750 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 750W PSU, Native 12V-2x6 Connector, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, Dual CPU Power Cables, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, P3-KN750-G1F and PCCOOLER CPS RT500 TC CPU Air Cooler, 5 Direct Contact Heat Pipes, 245W TDP, 152mm Tall, 120mm PWM Slient Fan, for Intel LGA1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black
